entities.name: TRANSBOUNDARY PESTS AND DISEASES
entities.description: Crop pests and diseases that spread across large geographical regions and jeopardize food security

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The availability and access to food, which is threatened by transboundary pest and disease outbreaks

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental shifts that accelerate the spread of transboundary pests and diseases

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, a partner in the CoE-CCRPP initiative

entities.name: COE-CCRPP
entities.description: Center of Excellence on Climate Change Research for Plant Protection, a joint initiative to study climate change impacts on agriculture P&D

entities.name: DEPARTMENT OF SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A government body that partnered with ICRISAT to establish the CoE-CCRPP

entities.name: PEST RISK DISTRIBUTION MAPPING AND FORECASTING
entities.description: A method used by CoE-CCRPP to map and predict the spread of pests

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENT PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Short and medium term practices to manage pests in the context of climate change

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: The process of strengthening the skills of stakeholders in climate resilient agriculture

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENT AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices designed to withstand climate change, supported by CoE-CCRPP

entities.name: PRIORITY PEST INDICATORS RANKING
entities.description: A method to determine and establish the ranking of priority pest indicators

entities.name: RISK ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of evaluating the risk and distribution of pests

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMICS OF PESTS AND DISEASES
entities.description: The study of social and economic impacts of pests and diseases

entities.name: PEST POLICIES
entities.description: Guidelines and regulations for pest management that CoE-CCRPP aims to enhance

entities.name: PRE-EMPTIVE BREEDING
entities.description: A method of breeding crops to prevent pest and disease complications

entities.name: PESTS AND DISEASES MONITORING AND SURVEILLANCE
entities.description: The systematic tracking of pests and diseases to strengthen sustainable agriculture

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming practices that are long-term and viable, supported by improved monitoring and breeding

relationships.target: PEST RISK DISTRIBUTION MAPPING AND FORECASTING
PESTS AND DISEASES MONITORING AND SURVEILLANCE

relationships.source: PESTS AND DISEASES MONITORING AND SURVEILLANCE
